<!-- Thanks for contributing! Keep PRs focused. See CONTRIBUTING.md. -->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change and what is the clinical/technical rationale? -->

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Engine / calculation change (safety-critical)
- [ ] Docs / tooling
- [ ] Profile or reference data

## Checklist

- [ ] No clinical constant was hardcoded in the engine
- [ ] Clinical values (if any) are source-traceable (cited)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] `npm run lint`, `npm run typecheck`, `npm run build`, `npm run test:coverage` pass
